hooks.command: $d=$input|ConvertFrom-Json;$fp=$d.tool_input.file_path;if($fp -like '*\Billy.Api\*.cs' -and $fp -notlike '*\obj\*' -and $fp -notlike '*\Utils\*' -and $fp -notlike '*\Converters\*' -and $fp -notlike '*\Repositories\*'){Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You edited a Billy API resource file. If this change adds, removes, or modifies CRUD capabilities for any resource (e.g. adding a new repository class or changing its base class), update the feature matrix table in README.md."}}'}
